name: Diabetic Butter Rum Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the puffed rice into a blender and work it to a powder.
2. Transfer the powdered rice to a large bowl or food processor.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (granulated fructose, egg whites, butter rum flavoring, and vanilla extract) to the bowl.
4. Mix with a wooden spoon or steel blade until the mixture is completely blended. The mixture will be sticky.
5. Form the mixture into 20 patties.
6. Place the patties on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 300°F for 20 minutes, or until the surface of the patties feels dry.
- Exchange: 1 candy = 1/5 bread, 3 grams carbohydrates, calories 23.
